ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the Twitter account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the Twitter account belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the Twitter account */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the Twitter account */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the profile image */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Current number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Current number of accounts the user is following */,
  "tweets_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets posted */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitter_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Twitter account the tweet belongs to */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption of the tweet */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the Twitter account has */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "time_since_posted" TEXT /* Time since the tweet was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes the tweet has received */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "parent_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet if it is a retweet */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the tweet */,
  "media_urls" TEXT /* URLs of any media (images, videos) attached to the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES twitter_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" INTEGER /* Trend score of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hashtag was first used */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hashtag information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement metrics were first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the engagement metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "time_sent" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., tweet, follower) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., engagement, follower growth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_twitter_accounts" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Twitter account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "account_id")
)
